mapper.select:
SELECT r.seq, r.member_name AS memberName, r.phone_number AS phoneNumber, r.membership_name AS membershipName, r.price, r.reason, r.bank_name AS bankName, r.account_number AS accountNumber, r.account_holder AS accountHolder, r.status, r.reject_reason AS rejectReason, r.created_date AS createdDate FROM complex_refund_requests r
ORDER BY r.created_date DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
